info.title: SilkWeb Agents API
info.description: SilkWeb is an AI agent network providing specialized intelligence across cybersecurity, logistics, infrastructure monitoring, finance, geospatial analysis, legal, personal injury, and criminal defense domains. Each agent operates independently with real analytical capabilities.

get.description: Returns a directory of all available agents with their capabilities, status, and endpoint information.

200.description: List of all available agents

post.summary: Scan URL for security headers and threats
post.description: Fetches a URL and analyzes HTTP response headers for security best practices, checks page content for threat patterns (XSS, injection), and generates a security grade A-F.

url.description: URL to scan (e.g., 'https://example.com'). Protocol is optional.

200.description: Security scan results with grade, header analysis, and threat findings

post.description: Connects to a domain on port 443, inspects the SSL certificate (issuer, expiry, fingerprint), protocol version, and cipher suite. Returns a security grade.

domain.description: Domain to inspect (e.g., 'example.com'). Protocol prefix is stripped if provided.

200.description: SSL certificate details, protocol info, and security grade

post.summary: Analyze domain DNS and email security
post.description: Checks DNS records (A, MX, NS, TXT), validates SPF and DMARC email authentication, checks for suspicious TLDs, and searches breach databases. Returns a domain reputation score.

200.description: DNS records, email auth status, reputation score, and findings

post.description: Runs all three scans (URL headers, SSL certificate, domain/DNS) in parallel and produces a combined security report with an overall grade.

domain.description: Domain to perform full security assessment on

200.description: Combined report with URL, SSL, and domain scan results plus overall grade

post.description: Checks an email domain for MX records, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, breach database presence, and disposable email detection. Returns a security score and grade.

200.description: Email security score, authentication findings, and breach check results

post.description: Analyzes a password for length, complexity, common patterns, and entropy. Returns a strength score and recommendations. Password is not stored or logged.

password.description: Password to analyze (analyzed in-memory only, never stored)

200.description: Password strength score, findings, and improvement recommendations

post.summary: Calculate route distance and transit options
post.description: Calculates haversine distance between two locations and estimates transit time, cost, and CO2 for all transport modes (air, sea, rail, truck). Accepts city names, airport IATA codes, port codes, or {lat, lng} coordinates.

origin.description: Origin location: city name (e.g., 'Shanghai'), IATA code ('PVG'), port code, or {lat, lng} object

destination.description: Destination location: same format as origin

weightTons.description: Cargo weight in metric tons (affects cost and CO2 estimates)

200.description: Distance, bearing, and comparison of all transport modes with recommendations

400.description: Could not resolve origin or destination

post.description: Optimizes multi-leg routes combining different transport modes. Each leg specifies origin, destination, and mode. Calculates total distance, time, cost, and CO2 across all legs including transfer times.

200.description: Per-leg breakdown and totals for distance, time, cost, and CO2

400.description: Invalid legs array or unresolvable locations

post.description: Returns required documentation, tariff notes, restrictions, and average clearance time for a trade corridor between two countries.

goodsDescription.description: Optional description of goods being shipped

200.description: Required documents, tariff notes, restrictions, and clearance estimates

post.summary: Calculate carbon emissions by transport mode
post.description: Calculates CO2 emissions for shipping cargo between two locations. Can return a single mode or compare all modes (air, sea, rail, truck) with tree-offset equivalence.

mode.description: Optional: specific transport mode. Omit to compare all modes.

200.description: CO2 emissions per mode with comparison insights and tree-offset data

post.summary: HTTP health check with response time
post.description: Performs real HTTP health checks on one or more URLs. Returns status (up/down/timeout), response time, status code, response headers, and a performance grade.

urls.description: Array of URLs to check in parallel

200.description: Health check results with status, response time, and performance grade

post.description: Resolves DNS records for a domain using multiple public resolvers (Google, Cloudflare, Quad9, OpenDNS). Checks consistency and propagation status.

200.description: DNS results per resolver with consistency and propagation analysis

post.description: Checks SSL certificate expiry for one or more domains. Returns days until expiry, severity classification (healthy/attention/warning/critical/expired), issuer, and protocol details.

200.description: SSL expiry status for each domain with severity and summary

post.summary: Analyze log lines for errors and patterns
post.description: Parses log lines to detect severity levels (critical/error/warning/info), categorize issues (memory, network, auth, etc.), detect error bursts, and calculate error rates. Provides health status and recommendations.

logs.description: Log content as a string (newline-separated) or array of strings

200.description: Log analysis with severity counts, error categories, bursts, and recommendations

post.summary: Classify incident and suggest root causes
post.description: Classifies an incident description into categories (outage, performance, security, etc.), assigns priority P1-P4, suggests probable root causes, mitigation steps, and estimated time to resolve.

affectedServices.description: Which services or systems are affected

userImpact.description: Description of impact on users (e.g., 'all users affected', '50% degraded')

metrics.description: Optional metrics data related to the incident

200.description: Incident classification, priority, root cause analysis, and mitigation steps

post.description: Calculates liquidity, profitability, leverage, efficiency, valuation, and cash flow ratios from financial data. Produces a health score (A-F grade) with flags and strengths.

200.description: Financial ratios, health grade A-F, flags, strengths, and benchmarks

post.summary: Partnership risk assessment between two companies
post.description: Evaluates financial risk of a partnership by comparing two companies' health scores, leverage, profitability, liquidity, and size. Returns a risk score with specific risk factors.

200.description: Partnership risk score, grade, risk factors, and recommendation

post.summary: Detect fraud with Benford's Law and anomaly analysis
post.description: Analyzes numbers using Benford's Law (chi-squared test for digit distribution), detects duplicate transactions, identifies statistical outliers, round-number bias, and threshold gaming patterns.

numbers.description: Array of numbers to test against Benford's Law

transactions.description: Array of transactions for duplicate/anomaly detection

200.description: Benford's Law results, duplicate detection, anomalies, and overall risk assessment

post.description: Returns applicable financial and data regulations for specified jurisdictions (US, EU, UK, SG, JP, AE, CN). Identifies relevant regulations based on industry and company type, and flags cross-border considerations.

jurisdictions.description: Array of country codes for multi-jurisdiction check

200.description: Applicable regulations per jurisdiction with scope, penalties, and cross-border notes

post.summary: Calculate distance with haversine and Vincenty methods
post.description: Calculates the distance between two points using both haversine (spherical) and Vincenty (ellipsoidal WGS-84) formulas. Returns distance in km, miles, nautical miles, plus bearing, cardinal direction, and midpoint.

from.description: Origin: city name (e.g., 'London') or {lat, lng} object

to.description: Destination: city name or {lat, lng} object

200.description: Haversine and Vincenty distances, bearing, midpoint

post.description: Uses ray-casting algorithm to determine if a point is inside a polygon. Returns inside/outside status, distance to nearest edge, and polygon area.

point.description: Point to test: city name or {lat, lng}

polygon.description: Polygon vertices as array of {lat, lng} objects

name.description: Optional name for the geofence zone

200.description: Inside/outside result, distance to nearest edge, polygon area

post.summary: Look up elevation for a location
post.description: Returns elevation data for a city or coordinate. Uses city database for known cities, or inverse distance weighting interpolation from nearby cities for custom coordinates.

200.description: Elevation in meters and feet with nearby cities for reference

post.summary: Calculate sunrise, sunset, and twilight times
post.description: Uses NOAA solar position algorithms to compute sunrise, sunset, civil/nautical/astronomical twilight, solar noon, day length, and polar conditions for any location and date.

date.description: Date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

200.description: Sunrise, sunset, twilight times, day length, solar noon altitude

post.description: Calculates Vincenty distances, bearings, travel times, and midpoints for each leg of a multi-waypoint route. Includes detour ratio, elevation profile, and formatted travel times.

waypoints.description: Ordered list of waypoints (minimum 2). Each: city name or {lat, lng}.

200.description: Per-leg distances, bearings, travel times; route summary with detour ratio

400.description: Less than 2 waypoints or unresolvable locations

post.summary: Analyze contract text for clauses and risks
post.description: Scans contract text to identify 15 standard clause types (termination, liability, IP, etc.), detect 17 risk patterns (one-sided discretion, unlimited liability, etc.), flag missing protections, and calculate an overall risk score 1-10.

partyName.description: Optional: your party name to identify favorable/unfavorable terms

200.description: Identified clauses, risk score, risk items, missing protections, and summary

post.description: Analyzes an NDA to determine type (mutual vs one-way), scope of confidential information, duration, standard exclusions, remedies for breach, and flags concerns like non-compete clauses or perpetual terms.

200.description: NDA type, scope, duration, exclusions, remedies, and concerns

post.summary: Research statutes for a legal question
post.description: Matches a legal question to relevant areas of law (breach of contract, employment, IP, negligence, business formation, consumer protection, real estate, data privacy) and returns applicable federal law, key concepts, remedies, and landmark cases.

question.description: Legal question or topic to research (e.g., 'What are my rights if a contract is breached?')

200.description: Matched legal topic, federal law, key concepts, remedies, and key case

post.summary: Generate standard contract clause from templates
post.description: Generates contract clause language from templates. Supports types like indemnification, limitation of liability, confidentiality, termination, force majeure, etc. Parameters can be filled in to customize the output.

parameters.description: Key-value pairs to fill template placeholders (e.g., {"party_a": "Acme Corp", "liability_cap": "$1,000,000"})

200.description: Generated clause text with parameters used and key considerations

post.description: Identifies applicable regulations for a business based on its description and industry. Covers technology (CCPA, COPPA, DMCA), healthcare (HIPAA), financial (SOX, BSA/AML), retail, manufacturing, and general employment law.

businessDescription.description: Description of the business and its activities

200.description: Applicable regulations by industry with requirements and compliance actions

post.description: Evaluates a personal injury case by identifying liable parties, analyzing injuries against a database of settlement ranges, assessing case strength based on circumstances, and checking statute of limitations.

accidentType.description: Type of accident (e.g., 'car accident', 'slip and fall', 'workplace injury', 'medical malpractice')

injuries.description: Injury or list of injuries (e.g., 'whiplash', 'broken arm', ['concussion', 'herniated disc'])

circumstances.description: Description of how the accident occurred

date.description: Date of accident (YYYY-MM-DD) for statute of limitations check

state.description: US state (name or abbreviation) for statute of limitations

200.description: Case strength score, liable parties, injury analysis, settlement range, and SOL status

post.description: Calculates total damages using both the multiplier method (severity-based multiplier on economic damages) and per diem method (daily rate for recovery period). Includes economic (medical, lost wages) and non-economic (pain and suffering) components.

injuries.description: Injury type(s) to determine severity multiplier

severity.description: Override severity level for multiplier calculation

200.description: Economic damages, non-economic damages (multiplier and per diem methods), and total ranges

post.description: Calculates the filing deadline based on state, accident type (personal injury, wrongful death, medical malpractice, product liability), and accident date. Returns days remaining, status, and filing requirements.

state.description: US state name or two-letter abbreviation

accidentType.description: Type of claim (e.g., 'personal injury', 'wrongful death', 'medical malpractice', 'product liability'). Defaults to personal injury.

200.description: Filing deadline, days remaining, status, discovery rule, and all state statutes

post.description: Evaluates insurance policy coverage limits against recommended minimums, identifies coverage gaps, and suggests strategies for maximizing recovery. Supports auto, homeowners, umbrella, and health policies.

200.description: Coverage assessment, gaps, and recovery strategies

post.summary: Get immediate action checklist for accident type
post.description: Returns a prioritized action guide for a specific accident type including immediate steps, things to avoid, 24-hour actions, and one-week follow-ups. Covers car accidents, slip and fall, workplace injuries, medical malpractice, and dog bites.

accidentType.description: Type of accident (e.g., 'car accident', 'slip and fall', 'workplace injury', 'medical malpractice', 'dog bite')

200.description: Prioritized action checklist with immediate, do-not, 24-hour, and 1-week steps

post.summary: Analyze criminal charges, elements, and penalties
post.description: Looks up federal criminal charges and returns statutory elements the prosecution must prove, maximum penalties, sentencing ranges, applicable defenses, and classification. Supports single or multiple charges.

charge.description: Single charge to analyze (e.g., 'wire fraud', 'drug trafficking', 'conspiracy')

200.description: Charge details, elements, penalties, sentencing range, and defenses

400.description: Missing charge (returns list of available charges)

post.description: Returns applicable constitutional rights, what to do, what not to do, and critical phrases for situations like traffic stops, arrests, searches, interrogations, protests, and grand jury proceedings.

200.description: Constitutional basis, rights, do's and don'ts, and critical phrases to invoke

post.description: Evaluates evidence for potential suppression motions based on Fourth Amendment (search/seizure), Fifth Amendment (Miranda), digital privacy (Riley, Carpenter), wiretap law, and chain of custody issues. Includes fruit of the poisonous tree doctrine.

howObtained.description: How the evidence was obtained (e.g., 'search without warrant', 'consent', 'wiretap')

chainOfCustody.description: Chain of custody details (e.g., 'gap in custody', 'tampered', 'unknown handling')

200.description: Suppression arguments with legal basis, strength, key cases, and next steps

post.description: Calculates advisory sentencing range based on charge and criminal history category. Lists aggravating and mitigating factors, alternative sentencing options (probation, home confinement, plea bargains), and key legal considerations.

charge.description: Criminal charge to look up sentencing for

criminalHistory.description: Criminal history level: 'none', 'minor', 'moderate', 'significant', 'serious', 'extensive' (or Roman numeral I-VI)

200.description: Sentencing range, mandatory minimums, aggravating/mitigating factors, and alternatives

post.description: Compares two or more criminal charges side-by-side showing maximum penalties, mandatory minimums, expungement eligibility, and plea bargain strategies including charge bargaining and mandatory minimum avoidance.

charges.description: Array of charge names to compare (minimum 2)

200.description: Side-by-side charge comparison and plea bargain analysis

tags.name: AEGIS Security
tags.description: Cybersecurity threat intelligence -- URL scanning, SSL inspection, domain reputation, email security, and password strength analysis

tags.name: NAVIGATOR Logistics
tags.description: Global logistics intelligence -- route calculation, multimodal optimization, customs compliance, and carbon footprint estimation

tags.name: SENTINEL Ops
tags.description: IT infrastructure monitoring -- health checks, DNS resolution, SSL expiry tracking, log analysis, and incident classification

tags.name: ORACLE Finance
tags.description: Financial intelligence -- company analysis with 20+ ratios, partnership risk scoring, Benford's Law fraud detection, and regulatory compliance

tags.name: ATLAS Geospatial
tags.description: Geospatial intelligence -- Vincenty/haversine distance, geofencing, elevation lookup, sun calculations, and route analysis

tags.name: JUSTICE Legal
tags.description: General legal and contract law -- contract analysis, NDA review, statute research, clause drafting, and compliance checking

tags.name: SHIELD Injury
tags.description: Personal injury / accident law -- case evaluation, damage calculation, statute of limitations, insurance analysis, and action guides

tags.name: FORTRESS Defense
tags.description: Criminal defense intelligence -- charge analysis, constitutional rights, evidence suppression, sentencing guidelines, and charge comparison
